updates.title: MINECRAFT IS HERE!!!!
updates.message: GUESS WHAT??? WE HAVE A MC SERVER!!!! JOIN IT ON YOU PC BY INSTALLING MINECRAFT, LAUNCH JAVA EDITIOM, GO TO MULTIPLAYER -> ADD SERVER, AND TYPE THIS FOR THE SERVER IP: isntthislikethe6-7serveruown.modrinth.gg NOW YOU CAN PLAY WITH PEOPLE ONLINE ON THE BEST LIFESTEAL SMP EVER!!! Also, addressing the one person who is constantly yapping about schoolboy runaway being on the homepage. The following is specifically for you. Are you a developer? Do you know how to code? Do you know how this website works? Because if you answered 'no' to any of those questions, then maybe you shouldn't be complaining about a single game on the homepage, because you have no idea why its been staying there, or the resaon some games never leave. I'm not gonna explain it because it complicated, but just know, if you don't fully know how and why everything on the website is there, then why are you complaning? Simply don't play the game! There are other people who want to play the game, which is why I added it in the first place. If you want a specific game on the homepage, then just ask. Most games I can easily add in a minute, if only people asked. updates.title: Proxies and MINECRAFT!!!!!
updates.message: So like, I had a brainwave, and now theres like 12 proxies, which hopefully should be enough for the people who asked for them. Also, do yall want a community minecraft server???? Tell me in the feedback form. Also maybe a visual update?

updates.title: Feedback & Other Stuff
updates.message: Welp, you guys definetly gave feedback, and it's only the first day! The main thing was games and proxies, so I will focus on those. I've had maybe like 1 specific game mentioned, and I will find a way to add that because I belive there are web-based versions online, so I'll check the UGS files. Anyway, before I got sidetracked, what are the people's thought's on a community minecraft server? Cuz we have some setup, I can add them to the website, if enough people want them. As far as proxies, until I can figure out how to not be lazy and do my job and like program, and stuff, we have to rely on other people to make them (I know, what a tragedy). Hopefully there is still one working, there were like 5 but they are going down fast, so I'll try to find more. Anyway, this was kind of a long update so here is the final overview: I will add a feedback button in the hero section, I will add more games, including the track game. I will double check which games work. And if you guys want, I'll add an IP for the community minecraft server. Make sure to let me know what you want here: https://forms.gle/YWdAgR5VeBF6HDpN9. And enjoy the games!

updates.title: New resource for Developers
updates.message: If you are web developer like me, and sometimes you have to work on a shool chromebook, then you know the struggle to impliment Javascript in your websites. That's why I made the developer's lab, a resource with a bunch of online tools, docs, and IDEs, as well as a html injector to inject single html files into a about:blank tab. This should make web development on school chromebooks much easier, so enjoy! To access the developer lab, just click and the develop button in the navigation.
